allow: Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('@fluentui/react-icons'\); console.log\('LightbulbFilled:', !!icons.LightbulbFilled\); console.log\('LightbulbOffFilled:', !!icons.LightbulbOffFilled\); console.log\('LiveRegular:', !!icons.LiveRegular\); console.log\('LiveOffRegular:', !!icons.LiveOffRegular\);")

Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('@fluentui/react-icons'\); const lightbulb = Object.keys\(icons\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('lightbulb'\)\); console.log\(lightbulb.join\('\\n'\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('@fluentui/react-icons'\); const candidates = ['Wand', 'PaintBrush', 'Sparkle', 'Eye', 'EyeTracking', 'Preview', 'Color', 'PaintBucket', 'Brush', 'Format', 'Style', 'Sparkles']; for \(const c of candidates\) { const filled = c + 'Filled'; const regular = c + 'Regular'; console.log\(c + ': Filled=' + !!icons[filled] + ' Regular=' + !!icons[regular]\); }")
